title: SafeDollar - REKT
relevance_summary: Infinite mint exploit via manipulation of accSdoPerShare value

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates accSdoPerShare value after a series of deposits and withdrawals
prevention.trigger: accSdoPerShare manipulation -> series of deposits and withdrawals in single tx

monitoring_rules: Block tx manipulating accSdoPerShare value after series of deposits and withdrawals
summary: The SafeDollar protocol was exploited through an infinite mint exploit by manipulating the accSdoPerShare value. A deposit/withdraw loop was used to inflate the value, allowing the attacker to claim a massive amount of SDO tokens. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for accSdoPerShare manipulation following a series of deposits and withdrawals.
